_comment: REFERENCE of what the claude pack (packs/claude/pack.sh pack_worker_setup) writes into each worktree — new-worker generates it, you do not copy this by hand. The allow:Read + additionalDirectories make the hub READABLE; the PreToolUse hook is what BLOCKS writes to it (a deny rule would not, see docs/02). Replace ABS_HUB / ABS_GUARD / ABS_NOTIFY with absolute paths. The permissions + PreToolUse block is written when HUB is set; the Notification/Stop hooks are added only when the project sets NTFY_TOPIC (ntfy attention pings), with WORKER = the worktree dir name and TOPIC = NTFY_TOPIC.
